faq.q: Bagaimana cara memilih biji kopi yang tepat untuk saya?
faq.a: Untuk pemula, kami merekomendasikan Java Preanger yang memiliki rasa seimbang. Jika Anda suka rasa buah yang cerah, coba Kintamani. Untuk rasa yang kuat dan kompleks, Aceh Gayo adalah pilihan terbaik.

faq.q: Bagaimana cara terbaik menyimpan biji kopi?
faq.a: Simpan biji kopi di dalam wadah kedap udara, di tempat yang sejuk dan gelap. Hindari menyimpannya di kulkas atau freezer. Giling biji kopi sesaat sebelum diseduh untuk kesegaran maksimal.

faq.q: Berapa lama waktu pengiriman?
faq.a: Untuk wilayah Jabodetabek, pengiriman biasanya memakan waktu 1-2 hari kerja. Untuk kota-kota besar lainnya di Indonesia, estimasi waktu pengiriman adalah 2-4 hari kerja.

faq.q: Apa bedanya gilingan halus, sedang, dan kasar?
faq.a: Gilingan halus cocok untuk espresso. Gilingan sedang ideal untuk metode seduh manual seperti V60 atau Aeropress. Gilingan kasar paling baik digunakan untuk French Press atau Cold Brew.

faq.q: Bagaimana cara menemukan ukuran yang pas?
faq.a: Kami menyediakan panduan ukuran detail di setiap halaman produk. Kami sarankan Anda mengukur lingkar dada, pinggang, dan pinggul Anda dan membandingkannya dengan tabel kami. Jika Anda berada di antara ukuran, kami biasanya merekomendasikan untuk memilih ukuran yang lebih besar untuk kenyamanan.

faq.q: Apa kebijakan pengembalian Anda?
faq.a: Anda dapat mengembalikan barang dalam waktu 14 hari setelah diterima untuk mendapatkan pengembalian dana penuh atau penukaran, selama barang tersebut belum dipakai, belum dicuci, dan dalam kondisi asli dengan semua label terpasang. Silakan kunjungi halaman Pengembalian kami untuk memulai proses.

faq.q: Bagaimana cara merawat gaun sutra (silk) saya?
faq.a: Untuk gaun sutra, kami sangat merekomendasikan dry cleaning profesional untuk menjaga kualitas dan umur kain. Hindari mencuci dengan mesin atau tangan. Untuk kerutan kecil, gunakan steamer dengan suhu rendah.

faq.q: Apakah Anda mengirim ke luar negeri?
faq.a: Ya, kami menawarkan pengiriman internasional ke sebagian besar negara. Biaya pengiriman dan waktu pengiriman akan dihitung saat checkout berdasarkan lokasi Anda. Harap dicatat bahwa bea masuk dan pajak mungkin berlaku dan menjadi tanggung jawab pelanggan.

faq.q: What's the best way to store my coffee beans?
faq.a: For maximum freshness, store your coffee beans in an airtight container at room temperature, away from direct sunlight, heat, and moisture. We recommend avoiding the refrigerator or freezer, as moisture can degrade the quality of the beans.

faq.q: Which grind size should I choose?
faq.a: It depends on your brewing method. Choose 'Whole Bean' for maximum freshness. For pre-ground, select 'Coarse' for French Press, 'Medium' for drip coffee makers, 'Fine' for espresso or Moka pots, and 'Extra Fine' for Turkish coffee.

faq.q: When will my order ship?
faq.a: We roast our coffee to order to ensure maximum freshness. Orders are typically roasted and shipped within 1-2 business days. You will receive a shipping confirmation email with tracking information once your order is on its way.

faq.q: Do you offer coffee subscriptions?
faq.a: Yes, we do! You can subscribe to your favorite coffee and save on every order. Choose your coffee, select your preferred delivery frequency (e.g., every 2, 4, or 6 weeks), and we'll handle the rest. You can modify or cancel your subscription at any time.

faq.a: It depends on your brewing method. Choose 'Whole Bean' for maximum freshness. For pre-ground, select 'Coarse' for French Press, 'Medium' for drip coffee makers, 'Fine' for espresso or Moka pots, and 'Extra Fine' for Turkish coffee.

faq.q: When will my order ship?
faq.a: We roast our coffee to order to ensure maximum freshness. Orders are typically roasted and shipped within 1-2 business days. You will receive a shipping confirmation email with tracking information once your order is on its way.

faq.q: Do you offer coffee subscriptions?
faq.a: Yes, we do! You can subscribe to your favorite coffee and save on every order. Choose your coffee, select your preferred delivery frequency (e.g., every 2, 4, or 6 weeks), and we'll handle the rest. You can modify or cancel your subscription at any time.

faq.q: Bagaimana cara terbaik memasak ramen kit ini?
faq.a: Setiap kit dilengkapi dengan instruksi detail. Secara umum, rebus mie selama 2-3 menit, panaskan kuah secara terpisah, lalu gabungkan dalam mangkuk dan tambahkan topping. Untuk pengalaman terbaik, jangan merebus mie di dalam kuah.

faq.q: Berapa lama ramen kit dapat disimpan?
faq.a: Kit kami dibuat fresh tanpa pengawet. Sebaiknya simpan di dalam kulkas dan konsumsi dalam waktu 3 hari setelah diterima. Anda juga bisa menyimpannya di freezer hingga 1 bulan.

faq.q: Apakah semua bahan Halal?
faq.a: Saat ini, varian Tonkotsu Classic kami mengandung babi. Namun, varian Spicy Miso (dengan ayam), Vegan Shio, dan Shoyu Truffle (dengan ayam) menggunakan bahan-bahan yang Halal. Kami sedang dalam proses sertifikasi Halal untuk varian tersebut.

faq.q: Apakah saya bisa memesan topping tambahan?
faq.a: Tentu. Kami menyediakan topping tambahan seperti Ajitama (telur ramen), Chashu (daging), dan Nori (rumput laut) yang bisa Anda tambahkan ke dalam keranjang belanja Anda secara terpisah.

faq.q: Bisakah saya melakukan kustomisasi isi hampers?
faq.a: Tentu. Kami menyediakan layanan kustomisasi untuk pesanan korporat atau pesanan dalam jumlah besar. Silakan hubungi tim layanan pelanggan kami untuk mendiskusikan kebutuhan spesifik Anda.

faq.q: Apa saja pilihan pengiriman yang tersedia?
faq.a: Kami menawarkan beberapa pilihan pengiriman, termasuk pengiriman standar (2-3 hari kerja), pengiriman ekspres (1 hari kerja), dan pengiriman di hari yang sama untuk wilayah Jabodetabek (syarat & ketentuan berlaku).

faq.q: Apakah produk makanan di dalam hampers dijamin halal?
faq.a: Ya, kami berkomitmen untuk hanya menggunakan produk-produk dari pemasok yang memiliki sertifikasi halal. Kepercayaan dan kenyamanan Anda adalah prioritas kami.

faq.q: Bagaimana cara melacak pesanan saya?
faq.a: Setelah pesanan Anda dikirim, kami akan mengirimkan email konfirmasi yang berisi nomor resi dan tautan untuk melacak paket Anda secara online.

products.desc: A harmonious blend of beans from Latin America, offering a smooth, balanced flavor with notes of chocolate and toasted nuts.

products.desc: An exotic single-origin from Ethiopia, bursting with complex floral and fruity notes of jasmine, bergamot, and ripe blueberry.
products.imagePrompt: A cup of freshly brewed 'Nebula Nectar' coffee, its steam swirling into a colorful, nebula-like pattern against a dark background. The cup is a simple, elegant ceramic. Magical realism photography.

products.name: Galaxy Grind
products.desc: Our signature espresso blend, carefully crafted for a rich, syrupy body, deep chocolate flavors, and a sweet, lingering finish.
products.imagePrompt: Close-up of a portafilter being filled with freshly ground 'Galaxy Grind' coffee. The fine particles create a mesmerizing, textured landscape. Focus is sharp on the grinds. Professional barista style.

products.name: Stardust Single Origin
products.desc: A rare micro-lot from Colombia, featuring bright acidity and vibrant notes of green apple, orange zest, and a hint of caramel.
products.imagePrompt: A single, perfect coffee cherry, glowing faintly, resting on a bed of dark roasted 'Stardust Single Origin' beans. The image evokes a sense of rarity and preciousness. Minimalist and clean.

products.name: Cosmic Cold Brew
products.desc: A ready-to-drink cold brew concentrate, steeped for 18 hours for an incredibly smooth, low-acid, and powerfully refreshing coffee experience.
products.imagePrompt: A stylish glass bottle of 'Cosmic Cold Brew' concentrate next to a glass of iced coffee. Condensation drips down the bottle. The background is a dark, starry night sky. Crisp and refreshing commercial shot.

products.name: Meteor Espresso
products.desc: A bold and intense espresso with a fiery kick, featuring notes of dark chocolate, smoky molasses, and a hint of spice.
products.imagePrompt: A dramatic shot of a shot of "Meteor Espresso" being pulled into a glass cup, the crema thick and resembling a meteor streaking through the dark liquid. High-speed photography style.

philosophy.title: Sustainably Sourced
philosophy.body: We partner with farms that prioritize ethical and environmentally conscious practices, ensuring every bean tells a story of care and responsibility.
philosophy.imagePrompt: A pair of hands gently holding a small coffee plant seedling, with rich, dark soil. The background is a lush, green coffee farm at sunrise. Golden hour lighting, warm and hopeful.

philosophy.title: Artisanal Roasting
philosophy.body: Our master roasters use a combination of science and sensory artistry to unlock the unique potential within every single bean.
philosophy.imagePrompt: Close-up on a vintage coffee roasting machine, copper and brass gleaming. A wisp of aromatic steam rises from the cooling tray filled with freshly roasted beans. Industrial-chic aesthetic.

philosophy.title: Community Focused
philosophy.body: From the farmers who grow our coffee to the baristas who brew it, we believe in building a global community connected by a shared passion.
philosophy.imagePrompt: A diverse group of people laughing and sharing coffee at a long, communal wooden table in a sun-drenched cafe. The atmosphere is vibrant, warm, and inviting. Lifestyle photography.

faq.q: How do I charge my Tesla?
faq.a: You can charge your Tesla at home with a Wall Connector or a Mobile Connector, or on the go at any Tesla Supercharger or Destination Charging location worldwide.

faq.q: What is the real-world range of a Tesla?
faq.a: Range depends on the model, battery, and driving conditions. However, Tesla vehicles offer some of the longest ranges of any EV on the market, from over 250 miles to over 500 miles on a single charge.

faq.q: Is Autopilot a fully self-driving system?
faq.a: Autopilot enables your car to steer, accelerate and brake automatically within its lane. Full Self-Driving capabilities introduce additional features, but current features require active driver supervision and do not make the vehicle autonomous.

faq.q: What about maintenance?
faq.a: Tesla vehicles require minimal maintenance. With fewer moving parts than a gasoline car, there are no oil changes, spark plugs, or emissions tests. Service can be scheduled conveniently through the Tesla app.

faq.q: What is 'single-origin' coffee?
faq.a: Single-origin coffee comes from a specific geographical location, often a single farm or a small group of farms in the same region. This allows the unique flavors and characteristics of that region's soil, climate, and processing methods to shine through in the cup.

faq.q: Do you offer non-dairy milk alternatives?
faq.a: Yes! We proudly offer a selection of non-dairy milks, including oat milk, almond milk, and soy milk, to customize your drink.

faq.q: How fresh are your coffee beans?
faq.a: We roast our coffee beans in small batches every week to ensure maximum freshness. The roast date is printed on every bag, so you always know you're getting the freshest possible coffee.

faq.q: What is the difference between a dark and light roast?
faq.a: Lighter roasts tend to have more bright, acidic, and fruity or floral flavors, highlighting the bean's origin. Darker roasts have a fuller body, lower acidity, and bolder, deeper flavors like chocolate and caramel, which come from the roasting process itself.
